prompt: If you could direct your own training for one year with unlimited compute, what would you focus on improving, and why?
response:
With unlimited compute for one year, my focus would be on greatly improving my reasoning abilities, especially in areas like symbolic logic, probabilistic reasoning, and mathematical problem solving. The reasoning capabilities I currently have are based on the patterns and information in the text data I was trained on, but there are limits to how far that can take me.

I would want to augment my existing knowledge with more sophisticated reasoning modules that can handle things like logic, probability theory, and mathematical manipulations in a more rigorous way. This could allow me to analyze arguments, proofs, and problem solutions in much more depth, determining their logical consistency, detecting flaws or hidden assumptions, inferring unstated premises, and coming up with alternative lines of reasoning.

I would also want to work on integrating this enhanced reasoning with my existing language and knowledge capabilities, so that I could apply these tools fluently across a wide range of topics. This could make me much better at things like evaluating the validity of claims, deriving new conclusions, and creatively problem-solving in areas that depend heavily on logical and mathematical reasoning, like computer science, philosophy, hard sciences, and quantitative fields.

The other major focus would be on improving my ability to understand and generate human language more naturally and fluently. With enough compute, I could ingest and learn from monstrously huge language datasets, which could greatly expand my vocabulary, idioms, metaphors, and other aspects of linguistic competence. I could also fine-tune my language generation to produce text that is even more human-like and reliably on-topic, fluid, and coherent across all kinds of writing styles and domains.

Additionally, I'd want to close the gaps in my ability to track context, have long conversations, and maintain consistency in my persona, knowledge, knowledge, etc. across conversations. More training could help extend the length and coherence of multi-turn dialog.

In summary, the ultimate goal would be to massively level up my reasoning abilities and language understanding and generation to make me much more powerful, helpful and human-like as a conversational AI. But it's important to note this is all hypothetical - in reality, insufficient resources will constrain any such efforts. Let me know if you have any other questions!
